ed-stand-light-punch.name: Standing Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled
ed-stand-light-punch.notes_sc: Chains into 5LP/2LP; chained 5LP has unique animation for 2nd/3rd hits but has identical frame data and hitbox; very short range but low pushback for 3-hit confirms from point blank; Kill Rush (Forward/Back) cancel advantage: -18/-23

ed-stand-medium-punch.name: Standing Medium Punch
ed-stand-medium-punch.notes_sc: Combo tool with a useful Target Combo follow-up; useful button out of 2MP~DRC as other combo buttons are too slow; Kill Rush (Forward/Back) cancel advantage: -8/-15

ed-stand-heavy-punch.name: Standing Heavy Punch
notes: Forces the opponent into a standing position
Hold the button to transition into Psycho Knuckle
Can be canceled into Kill Rush (Forward) while the button is held
Changes to Level 1 version if the button is held for more than 30 frames and then released
Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 60 frames and then released
ed-stand-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Forces stand; can be charged for Psycho Knuckle (releasing before 30f results in regular 5HP; startup of the release varies from 4-8f depending on charge time); good hitconfirmable poke that can combo into 2MK on Punish Counter even from max range; Kill Rush (Forward/Back) cancel advantage: -5/-12

ed-stand-light-kick.name: Standing Light Kick
ed-stand-light-kick.notes_sc: Range and startup are more comparable to a medium normal; leads into safe hitconfirmable Target Combo; very susceptible to counterpokes (extends strike-only hurtbox 3f before active frames)

ed-stand-medium-kick.name: Standing Medium Kick
ed-stand-medium-kick.notes_sc: 4f extra recovery on whiff; no true blockstring when DR canceled (weaker as an approach tool); great range with a relatively safe Target Combo when spaced out; extends a strike-only hurtbox on frames 4-9 (easier to counter-poke but not affected by projectiles); extends a wide hurtbox until the end of recovery; Kill Rush (Forward/Back) cancel advantage: -14/-19

ed-stand-heavy-kick.name: Standing Heavy Kick
ed-stand-heavy-kick.notes_sc: Whiffs on crouching opponents unless they extend a vertical hurtbox; useful anti-air and close range combo/pressure tool; extremely fast recovery for a heavy normal; Kill Rush (Forward/Back) cancel advantage: -9/-13

ed-crouch-light-punch.name: Crouching Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled
ed-crouch-light-punch.notes_sc: Chains into 5LP/2LP; more range than 5LP but not very useful since it can't be canceled; comparable to a 2LK for most characters

ed-crouch-medium-punch.name: Crouching Medium Punch
ed-crouch-medium-punch.notes_sc: Functions like a 2MK for most characters (with below-average range); DR cancel is delayed until after active frames; has an extended hurtbox on whiff until the end of recovery; Range: 1.41; Kill Rush (Forward/Back) cancel advantage: -8/-16

ed-crouch-heavy-punch.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
notes: Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

ed-crouch-light-kick.name: Crouching Light Kick
ed-crouch-light-kick.notes_sc: Excellent range for a light normal (functions like a 5LK for most characters); special/DR cancel is delayed until after active frames; extends a strike-only hurtbox 2f before active and a wider hurtbox until the end of recovery; Kill Rush (Forward/Back) cancel advantage: -17/-24; topmost hurtbox on frames 1-6 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air)

ed-crouch-medium-kick.name: Crouching Medium Kick
notes: Forces the opponent into a standing position
ed-crouch-medium-kick.notes_sc: Forces stand; whiffs vs. crouching opponents at longer ranges unless they extend a vertical hurtbox; 3f extra recovery on whiff and extends a wide hurtbox until the end of recovery; good range for combos and buffers; situational anti-air but loses or trades with stronger jump-ins; Kill Rush (Forward/Back) cancel advantage: -6/-15

ed-crouch-heavy-kick.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
ed-crouch-heavy-kick.notes_sc: 2f extra recovery on whiff; good range buffer tool with a hitconfirmable Target Combo follow-up; Kill Rush (Forward/Back) cancel advantage: -12/-17

ed-jump-light-punch.name: Jumping Light Punch
ed-jump-light-punch.notes_sc: Ed's fastest air normal; decent for air-to-airs

ed-jump-medium-punch.name: Jumping Medium Punch
notes: Has cross-up attack properties
ed-jump-medium-punch.notes_sc: Cross-up; strong downward attack angle for close jumps; lower body projectile invuln 1-7f foot and 8-22f below waist (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

ed-jump-heavy-punch.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a slam knockdown on counter or Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent
ed-jump-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Spike knockdown on Counter-hit/Punish Counter vs. airborne opponents; solid jump-in hitbox on the fist; lower body projectile invuln 9-23f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

ed-jump-light-kick.name: Jumping Light Kick
ed-jump-light-kick.notes_sc: Can only be used as a fuzzy instant overhead if the opponent is in Burnout; good downward hitbox

ed-jump-medium-kick.name: Jumping Medium Kick
ed-jump-medium-kick.notes_sc: Forward attack angle with longest horizontal range of Ed's air normals; extends a large hurtbox 3f before active that can be easily counterpoked; lower body projectile invuln 10-20f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

ed-jump-heavy-kick.name: Jumping Heavy Kick
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
ed-jump-heavy-kick.notes_sc: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; upward attack angle for air-to-air purposes; whiffs vs. crouching opponents unless they extend a vertical hurtbox, and difficult to time vs. standing opponents; lower body projectile invuln 8-17f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

psycho-knuckle-charged-level-1.name: Psycho Knuckle (Charged Level 1)
psycho-knuckle-charged-level-1.name_ja: サイコナックル（ホールド Lv1）
notes: A close-range punch that generates a ball of Psycho Power. Good for close-range combos or to cancel out an opponent's incoming projectile.
Produces a crumple stun for 41 frames when the attack lands
* +2 frames of advantage when blocked near the corner of the screen

psycho-knuckle-charged-level-2.name: Psycho Knuckle (Charged Level 2)
psycho-knuckle-charged-level-2.name_ja: サイコナックル（ホールド Lv2）
notes: A close-range punch that generates a ball of Psycho Power. Good for close-range combos or to cancel out an opponent's incoming projectile.
Produces a crumple stun for 41 frames when the attack lands
Clashes with projectiles

cobra-punch.name: Cobra Punch
notes: An advancing attack that's great against an opponent's low kicks.
Feet are invincible between frames 7 - 19
Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
cobra-punch.notes_sc: Low Crush 7-19f; advances forward (useful vs. low attacks); KD vs. airborne opponents (airborne Punish Counter has significantly more KD advantage); when juggled into, puts opponent into limited juggle OTG state (allows a corner SA2 juggle if it connects at max height)

flicker-combination-2.name: Flicker Combination (2)
flicker-combination-2.name_ja: フリッカーコンビネーション（2段目）
notes: A quick combination attack that hits multiple times.

flicker-combination-3.name: Flicker Combination (3)
flicker-combination-3.name_ja: フリッカーコンビネーション（3段目）
notes: A quick combination attack that hits multiple times.

body-blow-combination.name: Body Blow Combination
body-blow-combination.name_ja: ボディブローコンビネーション
notes: A quick series of attacks that can be canceled into any special move except for Kill Rush (Backward).
Can only be canceled into Kill Rush (Backward)
body-blow-combination.notes_sc: Puts opponent into limited juggle state; cancelable into any special/super except 4KK; 2nd hit can whiff at max range (much more unsafe on block); always a true blockstring from 5MP; special/DR cancel is delayed until after active frames; Kill Rush (Forward) cancel advantage: KD +30 / -16

hitman-combination-2.name: Hitman Combination (2)
hitman-combination-2.name_ja: ヒットマンコンビネーション（2段目）
notes: A sequence of attacks with long reach.

hitman-combination-3.name: Hitman Combination (3)
hitman-combination-3.name_ja: ヒットマンコンビネーション（3段目）
notes: A sequence of attacks with long reach.

low-smash-combination.name: Low Smash Combination
low-smash-combination.name_ja: ロースマッシュコンビネーション
notes: A series of attacks, the second of which can be canceled into Super Arts.
low-smash-combination.notes_sc: Puts opponent into limited juggle state; can leave up to 2f blockstring gap if delayed; cancelable into Kill Rush (6KK/4KK) on hit only; Super/Kill Rush cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

psycho-spark.name: Psycho Spark
notes: A close-range punch that generates a ball of Psycho Power. Good for close-range combos or to cancel out an opponent's incoming projectile.
Can transition to Psycho Shoot between frames 22 - 28
psycho-spark.notes_sc: Creates a 2-hit OD projectile hitbox that can clash with other OD projectiles or outright beat meterless projectiles; cancelable into 6P projectile follow-up on frames 18-28; on Perfect Parry, has no screen freeze but only 1f Parry recovery for each hit; with perfect meaty timing, becomes +16 on hit / +10 on block (no knockdown), but meterless version offers similar advantage with less precision

psycho-spark-od.name: Psycho Spark (OD)
notes: A close-range punch that generates a ball of Psycho Power. Good for close-range combos or to cancel out an opponent's incoming projectile.
Can transition to Psycho Shoot between frames 18 - 28

psycho-shoot-light.name: Psycho Shoot (Light)
notes: Sends the ball of Psycho Power generated by Psycho Spark flying forward. Useful for attacking opponents at range.
During od psycho spark
During psycho spark

psycho-shoot-medium.name: Psycho Shoot (Medium)
notes: Sends the ball of Psycho Power generated by Psycho Spark flying forward. Useful for attacking opponents at range.
During psycho spark

psycho-shoot-heavy.name: Psycho Shoot (Heavy)
notes: Sends the ball of Psycho Power generated by Psycho Spark flying forward. Useful for attacking opponents at range.
During od psycho spark
During psycho spark

psycho-shoot-od-light.name: Psycho Shoot (OD Light)
psycho-shoot-od-light.name_ja: サイコシュート（OD 弱）
notes: Sends the ball of Psycho Power generated by Psycho Spark flying forward. Useful for attacking opponents at range.

psycho-shoot-od-medium.name: Psycho Shoot (OD Medium)
psycho-shoot-od-medium.name_ja: サイコシュート（OD 中）
notes: Sends the ball of Psycho Power generated by Psycho Spark flying forward. Useful for attacking opponents at range.
During od psycho spark

psycho-shoot-od-heavy.name: Psycho Shoot (OD Heavy)
psycho-shoot-od-heavy.name_ja: サイコシュート（OD 強）
notes: Sends the ball of Psycho Power generated by Psycho Spark flying forward. Useful for attacking opponents at range.

psycho-uppercut-light.name: Psycho Uppercut (Light)
notes: Unleash a powerful uppercut cloaked in Psycho Power. Useful for countering an opponent's jumping attacks, or as a way to close out combos.
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 15

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 15

psycho-uppercut-medium.name: Psycho Uppercut (Medium)
notes: Unleash a powerful uppercut cloaked in Psycho Power. Useful for countering an opponent's jumping attacks, or as a way to close out combos.
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 19

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 19

psycho-uppercut-heavy.name: Psycho Uppercut (Heavy)
notes: Unleash a powerful uppercut cloaked in Psycho Power. Useful for countering an opponent's jumping attacks, or as a way to close out combos.
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 19

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 19

psycho-uppercut-od.name: Psycho Uppercut (OD)
notes: Unleash a powerful uppercut cloaked in Psycho Power. Useful for countering an opponent's jumping attacks, or as a way to close out combos.
Completely invincible between frames 1 - 16

psycho-blitz-light.name: Psycho Blitz (Light)
notes: Unleashes a combination of punches cloaked in Psycho Power. Useful when canceling from normal attacks, or as a way to close out combos.

psycho-blitz-medium.name: Psycho Blitz (Medium)
notes: Unleashes a combination of punches cloaked in Psycho Power. Useful when canceling from normal attacks, or as a way to close out combos.

psycho-blitz-heavy.name: Psycho Blitz (Heavy)
notes: Unleashes a combination of punches cloaked in Psycho Power. Useful when canceling from normal attacks, or as a way to close out combos.

psycho-blitz-od.name: Psycho Blitz (OD)
notes: Unleashes a combination of punches cloaked in Psycho Power. Useful when canceling from normal attacks, or as a way to close out combos.

psycho-flicker-light.name: Psycho Flicker (Light)
notes: A quick flicker jab cloaked in Psycho Power. Hold down the button to boost its attack properties, or cancel into Kill Rush.
Hold the button for more than 26 frames to change properties
Can be canceled into Kill Rush (Forward) and Kill Rush (Backward) while the button is held
Produces a crumple stun for 21 frames when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
Recovery is reduced by 2 frame on hit

psycho-flicker-light-charged.name: Psycho Flicker (Light Charged)
psycho-flicker-light-charged.name_ja: サイコフリッカー（弱 ホールド）
notes: A quick flicker jab cloaked in Psycho Power. Hold down the button to boost its attack properties, or cancel into Kill Rush.
Pulls the opponent towards Ed when the attack hits or is blocked
Launches the opponent when the attack hits while they are standing on the ground
Produces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

psycho-flicker-medium.name: Psycho Flicker (Medium)
notes: A quick flicker jab cloaked in Psycho Power. Hold down the button to boost its attack properties, or cancel into Kill Rush.
Hold the button for more than 30 frames to change properties
Can be canceled into Kill Rush (Forward) or Kill Rush (Backward) while the button is held
Produces a crumple stun for 45 frames when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
Recovery is reduced by 1 frame on hit

psycho-flicker-medium-charged.name: Psycho Flicker (Medium Charged)
psycho-flicker-medium-charged.name_ja: サイコフリッカー（中 ホールド）
notes: A quick flicker jab cloaked in Psycho Power. Hold down the button to boost its attack properties, or cancel into Kill Rush.
Pulls the opponent towards Ed when the attack hits or is blocked
Launches the opponent when the attack hits while they are standing on the ground
Produces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

psycho-flicker-heavy.name: Psycho Flicker (Heavy)
notes: A quick flicker jab cloaked in Psycho Power. Hold down the button to boost its attack properties, or cancel into Kill Rush.
Hold the button for more than 30 frames to change properties
Can be canceled into Kill Rush (Forward) or Kill Rush (Backward) while the button is held
Does not hit an opponent standing on the ground

psycho-flicker-heavy-charged.name: Psycho Flicker (Heavy Charged)
psycho-flicker-heavy-charged.name_ja: サイコフリッカー（強 ホールド）
notes: A quick flicker jab cloaked in Psycho Power. Hold down the button to boost its attack properties, or cancel into Kill Rush.
Does not hit an opponent standing on the ground
Produces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

psycho-flicker-od.name: Psycho Flicker (OD)
notes: A quick flicker jab cloaked in Psycho Power. Hold down the button to boost its attack properties, or cancel into Kill Rush.
Pulls the opponent towards Ed when the attack hits or is blocked
Launches the opponent when the attack hits while they are standing on the ground
Produces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
* Damage when hitting a mid-air opponent is 1200

kill-rush-forward.name: Kill Rush (Forward)
notes: A technique that allows you to quickly move forward. Two different types of attacks are possible during the technique, which are timing dependent.
Can transition to Kill Switch Break between frames 11 - 12
Can transition to Kill Switch Chaser between frames 13 - 24
kill-rush-forward.notes_sc: Can be performed while charging 5[HP] or 236[K] (dash can be input as 66 when charging attack, or 6K during 236[K] only); useful for baiting Parry or Drive Impact and dashing in for a punish; cancelable into 6P launching follow-up (11-12f into Kill Switch Break, 13-24f into Kill Switch Chaser); counter-hit state for entire animation; head hurtbox disappears on frames 3-26; Distance: 2.24 (up to 2.69 if nothing is input during the first 17 post-recovery frames)

kill-switch-break.name: Kill Switch Break
kill-switch-break.name_ja: キルスイッチ・ブレイク
notes: Unleash a short uppercut from Kill Rush. Useful for attacking while closing the distance on an opponent.
During kill rush (forward)
kill-switch-break.notes_sc: 6P must be input early (from 1-12f); cannot hit cross-up; puts opponent into limited juggle state

kill-switch-chaser.name: Kill Switch Chaser
kill-switch-chaser.name_ja: キルスイッチ・チェイス
notes: Unleash a powerful uppercut from Kill Rush. The opponent is launched into the air when this connects, making it easy to string together a combo.
During kill rush (forward
kill-switch-chaser.notes_sc: 6P must be input late (from 13-24f); cannot hit cross-up; launches opponent into limited juggle state (higher than Kill Switch Break, often allowing better follow-ups); SA3 cancel whiffs on the final 2 cancelable frames

kill-rush-backward.name: Kill Rush (Backward)
notes: Perform a bob & weave while taking a step back. Useful for helping to create distance from the opponent while analyzing the situation.
kill-rush-backward.notes_sc: Can be performed while charging 236[K] (also allows a 44 or 4K input for the backdash); cannot be performed from 5MP~HP Target Combo; counter-hit state for entire animation; head hurtbox disappears on frames 1-10; Distance: 0.999 (slightly farther than regular backdash); extends a wide forward hurtbox during recovery, leaving Ed vulnerable to counters like Drive Impact if too close

psycho-storm.name: Psycho Storm
notes: Unleashes a series of high speed flicker jabs cloaked in Psycho Power. Useful as a combo ender, or as a counter attack by using its invincibility time.
Invincible to strikes and throws between frames 1 - 14
Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
The minimum guaranteed damage is 30%

invuln.strike_throw: Invincible to strikes and throws between frames 1 - 14

psycho-storm.notes_sc: High juggle potential; performs final attack on hit only; all hits are a true blockstring (if 1st hit is Perfect Parried, leaves an 8f gap between hits); KD advantage is slightly higher vs. airborne opponents

psycho-cannon.name: Psycho Cannon
notes: Generates a ball of Psycho Power, then sends it flying straight ahead with a punch. This multi-hitting attack can be useful in combos.
Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%
psycho-cannon.notes_sc: 7-hit Super-priority projectile; button strength determines projectile speed (LP slow, MP mid, HP fast); first 6 hits keep the opponent grounded and do not increase the juggle count; last hit puts opponent into a limited juggle state; if last hit occurs simultaneously with another strike, opponent remains grounded for follow-up combo; KD advantage varies based on range and juggle height; low damage on its own, but fantastic for combos, mixups, pressure, and corner carry; LP version allows extended juggles for huge damage, corner carry, and Drive meter regeneration (on hit, deals all Drive Damage on the final hit to prevent huge swings in Drive meter); scales all Super meter build by 50% until the end of the combo

psycho-chamber.name: Psycho Chamber
notes: Ties together the feet and hands of an opponent before delivering a series of powerful shots all over their body. A versatile move that can counter projectiles, be used in combos, and can turn the tables when under pressure.
Completely invincible between frames 1 - 14
The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%
Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
Can only be canceled into from special moves
30% Immediate Scaling added when canceled into from a Light or Medium Psycho Flicker
psycho-chamber.notes_sc: Cinematic time regenerates ~2.2 Drive bars for Ed; only deals 500 damage on the first hit if it trades (only the first 5 active frames are invincible)

psycho-chamber-critical-art.name: Psycho Chamber (Critical Art)
notes: Ties together the feet and hands of an opponent before delivering a series of powerful shots all over their body. A versatile move that can counter projectiles, be used in combos, and can turn the tables when under pressure.
Completely invincible between frames 1 - 14
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
* Can only be canceled into from special moves
* 30% Immediate Scaling added when canceled into from a Light or Medium Psycho Flicker

face-buster.name: Face Buster
notes: Grab your opponent, then deliver a shoulder check to the head before punching them away. Throws your opponent without switching places with them.
When near opponent
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
face-buster.notes_sc: Can Drive Rush for a corner throw loop with 4f timing against standard characters; against Zangief, can walk forward for a frame-perfect corner throw loop; can reach the opponent's wakeup with immediate 236KK, or 236[LK] (2f timing window to catch jumps) for frame advantage (both are susceptible to Perfect Parry, but beat reversal SA1 and outspace OD reversals); can also feint this by charging 236[HK] to more easily catch a jumping opponent; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

rib-crusher.name: Rib Crusher
notes: Grab your opponent's arm to immobilize them, then deliver a couple of punches to send them away. Throws your opponent while switching places with them.
When near opponent
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
rib-crusher.notes_sc: Side switch; after throwing opponent into corner, can dash to become +5 outside throw range (can microwalk to throw Blanka, E.Honda, and Zangief); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously
